features: ONVIF Profile G, S, and T conformant (confirmed consistently across at least 8 independent retailer datasheets)
people and vehicle detection, line crossing, object detection, region intrusion, video blurring/tamper detection
removable IR-cut filter for true day/night
3.5mm audio input jack in addition to built-in mic

frigate.notes: ONVIF Profile G/S/T conformance confirmed extremely consistently across many independent retailer datasheets. Exact RTSP URL path not found in an official Speco source; recommend ONVIF auto-discovery or checking the camera's own web UI rather than assuming a path.

home_assistant.notes: ONVIF Profile G/S/T conformance explicitly and repeatedly confirmed for this model.

blue_iris.notes: Strong ONVIF conformance makes this a likely good fit; not independently confirmed with Blue Iris specifically.
